questions.title: Crossing the Line (West to East)
questions.question: City A is 30°W. City B is 30°E. If it is 8:00 AM in City A, what time is it in City B?
questions.explanation:
Step 1: West to East (Cross 0). Add degrees: 30° + 30° = 60°.
Step 2: 60 ÷ 15 = 4 Hours.
Step 3: East is ahead. 8:00 + 4 = 12:00.
